title: Childcare Payments Act 2014, Section 1
body: Entitlement to receive money towards costs of childcare. HMRC must pay the top-up payment into the childcare account. The amount of the top-up payment is 25% of the amount of the qualifying payment.

title: Childcare Payments Act 2014, Section 21
body: Calculating the top-up element of payments. For the purposes of this Act the top-up element of any amount is an amount equal to the relevant percentage of that amount. The relevant percentage is the percentage given by R divided by 100 plus R, multiplied by 100, where R is the percentage for the time being specified in section 1(4).
